title: EMERGENCY FARM LOANS - 211info
text: UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE RURAL DEVELOPMENT OREGON STATE EMERGENCY FARM LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency loans to restore or replace essential property and living expenses, cover production costs, reorganize operations, or refinance certain debts when a natural disaster is declared by the Secretary of Agriculture or by the President under the Stafford Act. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 1801 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Varies Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 414-3300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 414-3300 Main phone (866) 923-5626 Ext: 1 Toll-free Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information or eligibility criteria FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Disaster Loans * Agricultural Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - WILLAMETTE NATIONAL FOREST FIREWOOD PERMITS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME REPAIR ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 502 DIRECT HOME LOAN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE RURAL DEVELOPMENT OREGON STATE
